untranslatable_reason: The Adam & Adam Double Top pattern requires detection of twin-peak chart formations with specific morphology (narrow inverted V-shapes, volume distribution across peaks). This is a complex shape-recognition task that cannot be expressed using only price-based indicators and moving averages. Pattern detection requires candlestick pattern recognition or peak/valley detection algorithms not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a visual chart pattern with specific peak morphology and volume characteristics. Attempted to capture basic SHORT bias with volume confirmation and mean-reversion exit, but this is a placeholder. True implementation would require a pattern-matching algorithm to identify: (1) two distinct peaks forming narrow inverted V-shapes, (2) volume heavier on left peak than right peak, (3) possible one-day upward spike. The 72% success rate and 19% average decline targets the bearish bias direction. For production use, implement dedicated double-top pattern detection logic.
